title: Layer 4: AI & Tech Competition
desc: Technology as the long-term structural variable
desc_zh: 技术作为长期结构性变量

gpuBlackMarket.threshold: Premium falling = sanctions leaking; Premium rising = bottleneck tightening
gpuBlackMarket.threshold_zh: 溢价下降=制裁在漏；溢价上升=瓶颈收紧
gpuBlackMarket.note: H100/B200 grey market premium. Monitor restrictions vs smuggling flows.
gpuBlackMarket.note_zh: H100/B200灰市溢价。关注禁令与走私流量的博弈。

chinaAiAdoption.value: 114M+ tokens/day (DeepSeek) · 500K+ devs on 通义 · 200+ enterprise deployments (文心)
chinaAiAdoption.value_zh: DeepSeek日均API调用1.14亿+ tokens · 通义灵码50万+开发者 · 文心200+企业落地
chinaAiAdoption.threshold: Monitor: daily token volume growth, enterprise case count acceleration
chinaAiAdoption.threshold_zh: 关注：日均Token量增速、企业案例加速曲线
chinaAiAdoption.note: Token usage is the single best proxy for real AI penetration — not 'enterprise adoption' headlines.
chinaAiAdoption.note_zh: Token用量是衡量AI真实渗透率的最佳指标——比'企业加速部署'这种定性描述有说服力得多。

aiInferenceVolume.unit: China LLM API inference market size
aiInferenceVolume.unit_zh: 中国大模型API推理市场规模
aiInferenceVolume.threshold: Inference revenue growing faster than training = real economy adoption, not just model-building
aiInferenceVolume.threshold_zh: 推理收入增速超训练=真实经济渗透，不只是建模型
aiInferenceVolume.note: Inference-to-training revenue ratio is the key metric. China inference share rising faster than US at same stage.
aiInferenceVolume.note_zh: 推理/训练收入比是关键指标。中国推理占比增速超过美国同阶段。

aiMilitaryDeployment.value: 300K+ annual drone production · AI C2 in all theater commands · ASW AI systems deployed
aiMilitaryDeployment.value_zh: 年产能30万+无人机 · AI指挥系统覆盖全部战区 · 反潜AI系统已部署
aiMilitaryDeployment.threshold: Watch: autonomous swarm tests, AI-vs-human wargame results, satellite AI edge processing
aiMilitaryDeployment.threshold_zh: 关注：自主蜂群测试、AI vs 人类兵棋推演结果、卫星AI边缘处理
aiMilitaryDeployment.source: PLA public disclosures · Janes · ASPI Critical Technology Tracker
aiMilitaryDeployment.note: China has more drone manufacturers than the rest of the world combined. AI target recognition + autonomous loitering = the real asymmetric advantage.
aiMilitaryDeployment.note_zh: 中国无人机厂商数量超过全球其他地区总和。AI目标识别+自主巡弋=真正的非对称优势。

aiComputePower.value: ~85 GW data center capacity · 35% YoY growth · 8% of national grid
aiComputePower.value_zh: 数据中心容量约85GW · 同比增35% · 占全国电网8%
aiComputePower.threshold: Data center share of national grid >10% = structural demand shift; >15% = bottleneck risk
aiComputePower.threshold_zh: 数据中心占全国电网比值>10%=结构性需求转移；>15%=瓶颈风险
aiComputePower.source: IEA · NEA China · SemiAnalysis DC tracker
aiComputePower.note: China's total electricity generation: ~9,500 TWh (2025). AI data center share rising faster than US on a % basis.
aiComputePower.note_zh: 中国总发电量约9,500 TWh(2025年)。AI数据中心占比增速在百分比上超过美国。

aiSpaceCapability.value: 68 orbital launches (2026 YTD) · 700+ satellites added · Tiangong fully crewed
aiSpaceCapability.value_zh: 2026年迄今68次轨道发射 · 新增700+卫星 · 天宫空间站满员运行
aiSpaceCapability.threshold: Launch cadence >100/year + 10,000+ satellite constellation = parity with US space AI capability
aiSpaceCapability.threshold_zh: 年发射>100次 + 万颗卫星星座 = 太空AI能力追平美国
aiSpaceCapability.source: CNSA · SpaceNews · Jonathan McDowell launch log
aiSpaceCapability.note: Qianfan (千帆) constellation competing with Starlink. Space AI = edge computing in orbit, autonomous rendezvous, ISR constellation coordination.
aiSpaceCapability.note_zh: 千帆星座对标Starlink。太空AI=在轨边缘计算、自主交会对接、侦察星座协同。

nvdaAsiaRevenue.threshold: Asia share rising = chips still flowing despite restrictions
nvdaAsiaRevenue.threshold_zh: 亚洲占比上升=芯片仍在流通
nvdaAsiaRevenue.note: Quarterly earnings. Check 'China' and 'Singapore' revenue breakdowns.
nvdaAsiaRevenue.note_zh: 季度财报。关注'中国'和'新加坡'的收入拆分。

chinaEnergyIntensity.threshold: Sustained -3%+ = AI + manufacturing efficiency offsetting energy costs
chinaEnergyIntensity.threshold_zh: 持续-3%以上=AI+制造效率在抵扣能源成本
chinaEnergyIntensity.note: Key competitiveness metric: China efficiency gains vs rivals' pure fuel cost exposure
chinaEnergyIntensity.note_zh: 关键竞争力指标：中国效率提升vs竞争对手的纯燃料成本暴露
